PRIVATE AND CONFIDENTIAL — Project Atlas

Internal memorandum re: the proposed acquisition by Globex Holdings Pte. Ltd.
(UEN T08LL1234A) of Acme Industries Pte. Ltd. (UEN 200512345A).

Working documents:
- A Share Purchase Agreement is being drafted.
- A Memorandum of Understanding was exchanged on the Signing Date.
- The definitive agreement is targeted for execution before the Closing Date.

The Purchaser has reserved a Material Adverse Change clause permitting it to walk
if a Material Adverse Effect occurs prior to the Effective Date.

Embargoed until announcement. Counsel: Dr Lim Wei Ming (NRIC S9988776B).
Contact: weiming.lim@globex.sg
